pr.title: [codex] Avoid global auth for unauthenticated providers
pr.body:
## Summary

- Make model providers with `requires_openai_auth=false` use an unauthenticated auth provider before consulting global ChatGPT auth.
- Add regression coverage so a local/OSS provider with global ChatGPT credentials does not attach auth headers.

## Validation

- `CARGO_HOME=/private/tmp/codex-cargo-home CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/private/tmp/codex-upstream-target cargo test -p codex-model-provider --lib`
pr.author: dannyzhang-oai
